ERRORS.ACCOUNT NOT CONFIRMED: The account has not yet been confirmed.
ERRORS.YOUR REQUEST DID NOT HIT OUR SERVER: Your request did not hit our server - Please check your internet connection and try again. If the problem occurs nonetheless, try again in a few minutes.
ERRORS.DID NOT RESPOND TO YOUR LOGIN REQUEST: Sorry, but {{providerString}} did not respond to your login request. Please, check your internet connection, reload the page and try again.

SORRY.AN UNKNOWN ERROR OCCURED: Sorry, but an unknown error has occurred. Please check your internet connection and reload the page. If the error still occurs, please contact us.
SORRY.DOLLHOUSE LOADS TOO LONG: Sorry, but the Dollhouse takes a very long time to load. Please reload the page if the Dollhouse is not displayed or displayed incorrectly. Please notify us if problems continue to occur after that.
SORRY.THE DESIRED USER CANNOT BE FOUND: Sorry, but there can't be found a User with the specified email address
SORRY.TOUR KEY NOT FOUND: Sorry, we are unable to find the specified Tour-Key
SORRY.WE ARE UNABLE To FIND THE DESIRED TOUR: Sorry, we are unable to find the desired Tour
SORRY.SORRY BUT DID NOT RESPOND TO YOUR LOGIN: Sorry but, your provider did not respond to your login request. Please, check your internet connection, reload the page and try again
SORRY.BUT THERE IS NO ACCOUNT FOR THE ENTERED: We checked the email, but there is no account for this email. If you have registered with Google or Facebook, log in with the appropriate provider. You can also create a new account. It's free of charge.
SORRY.BUT YOU CAN ONLY CREATE SAMPLE TOURS WIT: Sorry, but you can only create sample tours with your Freemium account. Please upgrade your account to get access to all features :)
SORRY.BUT YOU REACH YOUR MAXIMUM CONTINGENT FO: Sorry, but you have reached your maximum contingent for team members. Please upgrade your account to increase your contingent.
Sorry, but you have reached your maximum contingent for API keys. Please upgrade your account to increase your contingent.
SORRY.DELETE TAG BUT ROOM IN USE: Sorry, but the room '{{providerString}}' is in use. Please select another room to replace it. The selected tag then appears instead of the old tag.
SORRY.DELETE TAG BUT ETAGE IN USE: Sorry, but the etage '{{providerString}}' is in use. Please select another etage to replace it. The selected tag then appears instead of the old tag.
SORRY.THE FALLBACK LANGUAGE IS NOT FOUND: Sorry, but there is a problem with your default tag. Please check, if the default tag has at least one character and try it again.
SORRY.FILE TOO BIG: One of the files you intend to upload is larger than {{providerString}}. Please check and try again.
SORRY.INCORRECT ASPECT RATIO: One of the files you intend to upload has a wrong aspect ratio. The required aspect ratio is {{providerString}}. Please check and try again
SORRY.IT SEEMS THE PROVIDED MOBILE PHONE NUMBE: Sorry, but your mobile phone number seems to be invalid. Please make sure you have selected the correct country code and entered a valid telephone number. Then try again.
SORRY.IT SEEMS THE PROVIDED LANDLINE NUMBER IS: Sorry, but your landline number seems to be invalid. Please make sure you have selected the correct country code and entered a valid telephone number. Then try again.
SORRY.IT SEEMS THE PROVIDED FAX NUMBER IS NOT: Sorry, but your fax number seems to be invalid. Please make sure you have selected the correct country code and entered a valid fax number. Then try again.
SORRY.IT SEEMS THE PROVIDED PHONE NUMBER IS NO: Sorry, but your phone number seems to be invalid. Please make sure you have selected the correct country code and entered a valid telephone number. Then try again.
SORRY.NO PERMISSION TO CHANGE PHONE NUMBER: You don't have the permission to change the phone number.
SORRY.NO PERMISSION TO CREATE USER: You don't have the permission to create a team member.
SORRY.NO PERMISSION TO CHANGE USER: You don't have the permission to change this team member.
SORRY.NO PERMISSION TO DELETE USER: You don't have the permission to delete this team member.
SORRY.NOT ALLOWED TO DOWNGRADE THE LAST ADMIN: Sorry, but it is not allowed to downgrade the last admin.
SORRY.SERVER PROBLEM: There is a problem with the server. Please wait a moment, reload the page and try again. If the error persists, please contact our support.
SORRY.NOT ALLOWED TO CREATE: You don't have the permission to create this tour element.
SORRY.NOT ALLOWED TO DELETE: You don't have the permission to delete this tour element.
SORRY.NOT ALLOWED TO UPDATE: You don't have the permission to update this tour element.
SORRY.SORRY BUT THE PROVIDED EMAIL ADDRESS IS: Sorry, but the registered email is already taken. Please try to log in with this email or create an account with another email.
SORRY.SORRY BUT YOU PROVIDED AN INVALID EMAIL: Sorry, but you have entered an invalid email. Please check them out and try again.
SORRY.THE PASSWORD YOU ENTERED FOR THIS EMAIL: Hmm... the password you used is wrong. Please, check your password. If you have registered with Google or Facebook, log in with the appropriate provider. Or click on 'Forgot password'.
SORRY.WRONG FILE TYPE: One of the files you intend to upload is not one of the permitted file types ({{fileType}}). Please check and try again.
SORRY.YOUR PROVIDED DATA IS LINKED TO AN UNCON: Your data is linked to an unconfirmed account. Please check your email box to see if you have received a registration email.
SORRY.EMAIL FOR REGISTRATION VIA SOCIAL MEDIA: Unfortunately your social media account's email address was not given. Please register manually.
SORRY.THE TAG IS CURRENTLY IN USE AND CAN NOT: The Tag is currently in use and can not be deleted.
SORRY.THE TAG IS EMPTY: One of your used tags is too short. A tag must be at least one characters long.
SORRY.USER BLOCKED: We apologize for any inconvenience! Your authorization has expired and/or has been blocked in the meantime. For possible queries we are of course at your disposal
SORRY.USER ALREADY REGISTERED: Sorry, but you are already registered. Please use the link from the email to log in. You can find the link in the email you received from us when you registered.

SCHWARZ.REGISTER INFO:
Please understand that, in order to maintain the security of the market, we have to check your right regarding full access. The authentication is required via the Schwarz Group's Single-Sign-On (SSO).

If you have any queries regarding the acquisition of the necessary rights or problems with the login, please contact the contact person stored in the 360° Tour.

ONBOARDING.PLEASE REGISTER TO SEE PROTECTED CONTENT: Please register to see protected content.

TOUR STATES.DEACTIVATION MESSAGE: Unfortunately, the requested tour has been deactivated.
TOUR STATES.NOT FOUND MESSAGE: Unfortunately, the requested tour was not found.
TOUR STATES.SORRY TOUR IS DELETED: Unfortunately, the requested tour has been deleted.
TOUR STATES.PLUGIN ERROR MESSAGE: Unfortunately, the application has crashed. Please reload the page and try again. If the error persists, feel free to contact us.
TOUR STATES.PLUGIN ERROR SOLUTION 1: We recommend enabling the 'Use hardware acceleration when available' option in your browser settings (if available).
TOUR STATES.PLUGIN ERROR SOLUTION 2: It is possible that your graphics card is not compatible with this application.
TOUR STATES.WEBGL ERROR MESSAGE: To fully utilize the performance of our application, please enable hardware acceleration in your browser. This ensures optimal display and improves the speed of the application.
TOUR STATES.WEBGL ERROR BULLET 2 CHROME: Enable the 'Use hardware acceleration when available' option.
TOUR STATES.WEBGL ERROR BULLET 3 CHROME: Restart Chrome to apply the changes.
TOUR STATES.WEBGL ERROR BULLET 3 FIREFOX: Uncheck the 'Use recommended performance settings' option.
TOUR STATES.WEBGL ERROR BULLET 4 FIREFOX: Check the 'Use hardware acceleration when available' box.
TOUR STATES.WEBGL ERROR BULLET 1 EDGE: Go to Settings > System and Performance.
TOUR STATES.WEBGL ERROR BULLET 2 EDGE: Enable the 'Use hardware acceleration when available' option.
TOUR STATES.WEBGL SUPPORT MESSAGE: It appears that WebGL, which is required for this application, is not enabled in your browser or your browser does not support it. Please enable WebGL to use all the features of this application.
TOUR STATES.WEBGL SUPPORT BULLET 1 CHROME: Type chrome://flags into the address bar.
TOUR STATES.WEBGL SUPPORT BULLET 1 FIREFOX: Type about:config into the address bar.
TOUR STATES.WEBGL SUPPORT BULLET 2 FIREFOX: Click 'Accept the Risk and Continue' if a warning message appears.
TOUR STATES.WEBGL SUPPORT BULLET 1 EDGE: Type edge://flags into the address bar.
TOUR STATES.WEBGL SUPPORT BULLET 2 DEFAULT: Go to the Security or Advanced Settings section.
TOUR STATES.WEBGL SUPPORT BULLET 3 DEFAULT: Look for an option related to 'Graphics Acceleration', 'Performance', or 'WebGL'.
TOUR STATES.WEBGL SUPPORT BULLET 5 DEFAULT: Restart your browser to apply the changes.

COOKIE.DETAILS MESSAGE: Here you will find an overview of all cookies used. You can give your consent to entire categories or display further information and thus select only certain cookies.
COOKIE.ESSENTIAL COOKIES: Essential cookies enable basic functions and are necessary for the proper functioning of the website.
COOKIE.EXTERNAL MEDIA COOKIES: Contents of video platforms and social media platforms are blocked by default. If cookies are accepted by external media, access to this content no longer requires manual consent.
COOKIE.MARKETING COOKIES: If marketing cookies are accepted, third parties, such as YouTube, may set advertising cookies to.
COOKIE.MAP BLOCKED: Due to your cookie settings, you will not be able to view the map.
COOKIE.MESSAGE:
We use cookies on our website. Some of them are essential, while others help us to improve and operate our online services economically.

You can accept all, only the essential ones or reject individual cookies by clicking on the 'Individual settings' button. You can always call up these settings at any time and subsequently deselect cookies.
COOKIE.VIDEO BLOCKED: Due to your cookie settings, you will not be able to view the video.

COOKIE PROVIDER.APPLE PURPOSE: Used to unlock Apple content and functions
COOKIE PROVIDER.CHURN ZERO PURPOSE: Used to track use of features
COOKIE PROVIDER.DOUBLECLICK PURPOSE: This cookie is set if you watch a YouTube video on this page. This will then be used to play relevant ads.
COOKIE PROVIDER.GOOGLE ANALYTICS PURPOSE: Used to track use of features
COOKIE PROVIDER.GOOGLE TAG MANAGER 1 COOKIE PURPOSE: Registers a unique ID that is used to generate statistical data about how the visitor uses the website.
COOKIE PROVIDER.GOOGLE TAG MANAGER 2 COOKIE PURPOSE: Used by Google Analytics to limit the request rate.
COOKIE PROVIDER.GOOGLE MAPS PURPOSE: Used to unlock Google Maps content
COOKIE PROVIDER.GOOGLE.DE COOKIE NAME: ANID, SAPISID, APISID, SID, NID, CONSENT, SSID, HSID
COOKIE PROVIDER.GOOGLE.DE PURPOSE: Used to track YouTube content and save the user's settings.
COOKIE PROVIDER.GOOGLE.COM PURPOSE: Used to track YouTube content and user data and play relevant advertising.
COOKIE PROVIDER.STORES THE AUTHENTICATION DATA: Stores the authentication data of the logged-in user during the visit of a tour
COOKIE PROVIDER.STORES THE SETTINGS OF THE VISITOR: Stores the settings of the visitors, which were made in the cookie selection
COOKIE PROVIDER.VIMEO PURPOSE: Registers a unique ID used by Vimeo.
COOKIE PROVIDER.YOUTUBE PURPOSE: Used to unlock YouTube content and track user preferences.

INTRO.NAVIGATE VIA CLASSIC HOTSPOTS: To navigate, click on the blinking Company-Logo within the tour or floorplan, or navigate via the preview images.
INTRO.NAVIGATE VIA ARROW HOTSPOTS: To navigate, click on the arrows or the marks on the ground within the tour or floorplan, or navigate via the preview images.
INTRO.ZOOM WITH WHEEL: You can zoom in/out by scolling the mouse wheel.
INTRO.ZOOM WITH TOUCH: You can zoom in/out by pinching in on mobile.

MEASUREMENT.MESSAGE: Info: The dimensions shown may differ from the actual dimensions on site. Measuring is possible on the ground, the walls and the ceiling.
MEASUREMENT.MESSAGE 2D: Info: The dimensions shown may differ from the actual dimensions on site. Horizontal measurement is only possible on the floor. The vertical measurement must start on the floor.
MEASUREMENT.MESSAGE FLOORPLAN: Info: The dimensions shown may differ from the actual dimensions on site.

MISC.VIDEO CANNOT BE SHOWN DUE COOKIE SETTING: Due to your cookie settings regarding {{videoType}} the video cannot be shown.

USER GUIDE.DESC 1: 360° tours have special accessibility requirements. We therefore continuously develop solutions to make access as inclusive as possible.
USER GUIDE.DESC 2: If you encounter any barriers or have suggestions for improvements, we welcome your feedback.

NAVIGATION.TITLE: Navigation
NAVIGATION.DESC 1: You can look around with the mouse by clicking and dragging, and move to another viewpoint by clicking on hotspots.
NAVIGATION.DESC 2: For people with disabilities, it is also possible to use the keyboard: use the W, A, S, D keys to move and the arrow keys to look around.

EFFECTS.TITLE: Visual Effects & Animations
EFFECTS.DESC 1: These effects may cause discomfort in cases of motion sickness or epilepsy and can therefore be slowed down. They will also automatically slow down if your browser is set to "reduce motion."
EFFECTS.TOGGLE 1 TOOLTIP: The view slowly rotates on its own to give you an automatic panoramic look. You can stop the rotation at any time by clicking the mouse, touching the screen, or disabling the movement in the settings.
EFFECTS.TOGGLE 2 TOOLTIP: When entering the 360° tour, the camera flies in a short motion around the object (if a dollhouse is available) to the correct position. This makes the entry into the 360° tour feel smoother. If the movement makes you uncomfortable, you can cancel the animation with a click or slow it down in the settings.
EFFECTS.TOGGLE 3 TOOLTIP: When switching to another room, the view fades in with a transition effect. This makes it clear that you have changed rooms. The effect only lasts a few seconds and can be slowed down in the settings.
